title: Leave queued button
summary: When a user chooses Leave queued from Discord buttons, the agent should keep the Bead unclaimed and report the queue decision as a reusable workflow procedure.

title: Scheduled Check audit
summary: Scheduled Check jobs must emit candidates or reminders only; they must not apply memory, canon, skills, Beads, or routing mutations automatically.

title: Discord visibility boundary
summary: Discord-thread reports should state that the agent can only read directly delivered messages, not search channel history.

title: Hermes update warning
summary: Hermes update warnings should preserve customized local workflow procedure caveats before recommending an upgrade or restart.
